name: STLTH x Geek Bar 80K Disposable Vape: Tropical Mango Ice (30mL)
description:
Each pack contains 1 disposable vape device.

Available in the standard 20 mg/mL nicotine strength.

Each STLTH X GEEK BAR Disposable holds 30 mL of e-Liquid. 

The internal 820 mAh battery is rechargeable.

The STLTH X GEEK BAR Disposable with smart features and power. It’s built to last, with a massive 30mL e-Liquid capacity and a reliable 820mAh battery, making it useful for extended usage without the need for frequent recharges.

A vibrant digital display keeps you informed in real time, showing battery percentage, e-Liquid level, and current vaping mode with dynamic animations that react as you take a puff or charge the disposable. The triple-mode system, Off, Normal, and Pulse, can be adjusted easily using the airflow slider, giving you full control over intensity and strength of the draw.

Designed for a smooth and flavourful experience, this high-performance disposable delivers a consistently premium vape from start to finish.

name: KRAZE HD MEGA(Fruity Rancha Ice)
description:
ntroducing the Kraze HD Mega, a vaping game-changer. Featuring the largest 1.77-inch OLED screenin Canada. With enhanced dual-coil technology, 20mL e-liquid capacity, and up to 20,000 puffs, it ensures ultimate flavour satisfaction and long-lasting performance. The customizable experience includes Boost 24W/NormaI 12W modes, airflow control. Its user-friendly design includes a light & dark mode toggle, battery, and e-liquid indicators. It's time to go Krazy with the Kraze HD Mega.

Kraze HD Mega Key Features:

  • Switch Between Boost / Regular Mode (Press To Switch)
  • Up to 20,000 Puffs
  • MEGA HD OLED Screen - Battery and E-Liquid Indicator
  • Light & Dark Mode Toggle (Hold For 1 Second Switch)
  • Adjustable Airflow
  • Type-C Recharging Port (Cable Not Included)
  • Incredibly Sweet Flavours

Kraze HD Mega Specifications:

  • Normal Mode: Alternating Mesh Coil: 1.1 ohm 12W
  • Boost Mode: Enhanced Dual Mesh Coil: 1.1 ohm 24W
  • Dimensions: 95.8 x 28.7 x 51.8 mm
  • Battery: 800 mAh
  • Liquid Volume: 20 mL
  • Nicotine Strength: 20 mg/mL

name: Boosted Series Pods 28k(Watermelon Guava)
description:
Boosted Ultra Pod Series 2 delivers up to 28,000 puffs with 20ml of e-liquid and a powerful 0.6 ohm dual mesh coil. Featuring an OLED screen, adjustable airflow, variable voltage modes, child lock, and leak-proof design — all packed in a sleek, easy-to-use pod. Each carton includes 5 pods for long-lasting vaping on the go.

Flavor Profile

Blueberry Kiwi: Sweet blueberries meet tangy kiwi for a perfectly balanced fruity duo.

Blueberry Raspberry: Juicy blueberries blended with tart raspberries for a vibrant, refreshing taste.

Mango Peach Ice: Ripe mango and sweet peach with a cool, icy finish.

Mint: Crisp and invigorating pure mint for a refreshing burst.

Peach Ice: Succulent peach flavor with a refreshing icy touch.

Pink Lemon: Zesty lemonade with a hint of berry sweetness for a playful tang.

Pomegranate Peach: Tart pomegranate combined with juicy peach for a rich fruity experience.

Red Apple: Crisp, sweet flavor like biting into a freshly picked red apple.

Tropical Melon: Honeydew, cantaloupe, and watermelon blend for a smooth tropical vibe.

Watermelon Guava: Sweet watermelon and exotic guava for a tropical, mouthwatering delight.

name: Linvo Rave 60k(Coconut Ice)
description:
Linvo Rave 60K Pro - Coconut Ice

The Linvo Rave 60k Pro Disposable Vape revolutionizes the vaping experience with a blend of cutting-edge technology and uncompromised convenience. Designed for vapers seeking longevity and performance, it boasts an incredible 60,000 puffs and offers two customizable modes—Regular for a classic draw and Surge for extra dense clouds. The device is further enhanced by the world’s first Beat Sensing Display paired with a large LED screen, ensuring that every puff is not only satisfying but also interactive and visually engaging.

Engineered with precision, the Rave 60k Pro features a dual mesh coil that optimizes flavor and vapor production, complemented by rapid charge technology for consistent performance. With a nicotine strength of 20mg/ml and a generous 20ml e-liquid capacity, this vape delivers robust and flavorful clouds every time. Made by the same innovative company behind the iconic Oxbar, the Linvo Rave 60000 Pro is a testament to quality and forward-thinking design in the modern Canadian vaping market.

Check out all the flavours here!

KEY FEATURES

  • Up to 60,000 puffs
  • Two Vape Modes - Regular and Surge
  • Beat Sensing Display
  • Large LED screen
  • Dual Mesh Coil
  • Rapid Charge
  • 20mg/ml
  • 20ml e-liquid capacity
  • Made by same company that makes iconic Oxbar

name: STLTH 8k Pro(Pineapple Orange Cherry)
description:
Description

Introducing the STLTH BOX 8K PRO, a remarkable upgrade that takes disposable vaping to the next level. This cutting-edge disposable vape device features an all-new innovative LED screen, elevating your vaping experience to a whole new level!

The intuitive LED screen comes to life when you take a puff, displaying vital information such as the battery charge percentage and e-liquid levels in real-time. This means you'll always have up-to-date data on your device's status with every inhale, ensuring that you're never caught off guard by low e-liquid levels or a dead battery. When charge levels are low, the device can be easily recharged with a USB type-c cable.

Like its predecessor, the STLTH BOX 8K PRO provides an impressive 8000-puff capacity with a large 14mL e-liquid capacity and robust 800 mAh battery allowing users to enjoy longer vaping sessions between charges. At the core of the STLTH BOX 8K PRO lies its vertical mesh coil technology, delivering bold flavour and a smooth yet satisfying hit that can be adjusted with the device’s built-in adjustable airflow switch. 

Maintaining its sleek design with a matte finish, the STLTH BOX 8K PRO now offers an expanded range of 22 flavours, catering to various tastes. Whether you prefer classic tobacco or exotic fruit blends, there's a flavour for everyone. Enjoy elevated convenience and flavour variety with the STLTH 8K PRO!

Specifications:

  • Up to 8000 puffs
  • LED Screen with E-Liquid and Battery indicators
  • Rechargeable via USB Type-C
  • Matte finish (Feel and Style)
  • Vertical Mesh Coil for Optimal Flavour
  • 14 mL of E-Liquid
  • 20 mg/mL
  • 800 mAh Internal Battery

description:
Experience the Fruitii 50K Vape - a game-changing device that redefines vaping with innovation, performance, and an unmistakable flair.

Key Features:

  • 3D Curved Screen with Flashy Animations: The Fruitii 50K stands out with its futuristic 3D curved display. Packed with vibrant, eye-catching animations, the screen adds a touch of sophistication and fun to every puff. You can also monitor e-liquid and battery level on the display.
  • Massive E-Liquid Capacity: Engineered for endurance, the Fruitii 50K boasts a huge e-liquid capacity, ensuring up to 50,000 flavorful puffs. Perfect for those who value convenience and long-lasting enjoyment.
  • Boost Function for Peak Performance: Elevate your experience with the powerful boost function. Instantly amplify vapor production and flavor intensity at the push of a button, delivering rich, satisfying hits on demand.
  • Adjustable Airflow for Personalized Comfort: Tailor your draw to perfection with adjustable airflow settings. Whether you prefer a tight, flavorful hit or airy, cloud-filled puffs, the Fruitii 50K adapts to your preference.

VICE is back and better than ever with the VICE BOX 2 Disposable, a next-generation device that takes everything you love about VICE to the next level! With upgraded features and an impressive 30ML capacity for up to 70,000 puffs, this powerhouse delivers a flavour-packed vaping experience with unmatched longevity.

Bringing back some of the original VICE flavours that made the brand so popular, alongside an expanded selection of 20 bold and delicious options, the VICE BOX 2 delivers the same satisfying taste you know and love with a smooth, consistent draw. With adjustable airflow control, you can customize your inhale for the ideal experience.

Combining premium flavour, convenience, and reliability, the VICE BOX 2 is designed for vapers who want it all; in one, easy-to-use device. Its 30ML e-liquid capacity ensures extended enjoyment, while the upgraded features make your vaping experience smoother and more satisfying. Whether you're rediscovering the iconic VICE flavours or diving into bold new options, the VICE BOX 2 is the ultimate evolution of a classic—delivering an upgraded vaping experience with every puff!

name: Fruitii 50k(Tropical Burst Ice)
description:
Experience the Fruitii 50K Vape - a game-changing device that redefines vaping with innovation, performance, and an unmistakable flair.

Key Features:

  • 3D Curved Screen with Flashy Animations: The Fruitii 50K stands out with its futuristic 3D curved display. Packed with vibrant, eye-catching animations, the screen adds a touch of sophistication and fun to every puff. You can also monitor e-liquid and battery level on the display.
  • Massive E-Liquid Capacity: Engineered for endurance, the Fruitii 50K boasts a huge e-liquid capacity, ensuring up to 50,000 flavorful puffs. Perfect for those who value convenience and long-lasting enjoyment.
  • Boost Function for Peak Performance: Elevate your experience with the powerful boost function. Instantly amplify vapor production and flavor intensity at the push of a button, delivering rich, satisfying hits on demand.
  • Adjustable Airflow for Personalized Comfort: Tailor your draw to perfection with adjustable airflow settings. Whether you prefer a tight, flavorful hit or airy, cloud-filled puffs, the Fruitii 50K adapts to your preference.

name: STLTH Original Pods(Frost Mint)
description:
Each pack contains 3 disposable vape pods, each individually packaged for optimal freshness.

2.0 mL of E-liquid per pod.

Available in the standard 20 mg/mL, Bold 35, and Bold 50 strengths as well as a nicotine free option. 

______

As a participant in the National Greening Program, every sale of STLTH products contributes to the planting of more trees with the help of Tree Canada, a national non-profit organization. Thanks to your purchase, STLTH has helped plant over 8,300 new trees in Canada.

______

STLTH’s disposable vape pod system allows you all the convenience of a disposable vape without tossing valuable lithium batteries in the trash. The STLTH vape system uses a rechargeable battery base that provides the best experience when using the original disposable vape pods as well as the new STLTH X pods.

 

The nicotine blend used in STLTH vape pods is proprietary and purposely made to give the user a smooth experience to help accommodate adult smokers who are looking to make the switch from traditional tobacco-based nicotine sources like cigarettes and cigars.  

 

STLTH disposable vape pods are a great alternative to fully disposable vapes with enclosed lithium batteries since the STLTH vape pods fit into your rechargeable STLTH Device and the empty pods can be recycled through our current recycling program alongside your original STLTH X vape pods.

name: Elfbar GH20k(Miami Mint)
description:
Description

Discover Elfbar's exciting new invention, the GH20000. Customize your vaping experience with a triple mesh coil: Lite, Smooth, and Turbo mode, allowing you to adjust the strength to your preference. 

 

With an incredible capacity of up to 20,000 puffs, this vape is designed to satisfy your cravings like never before. The GH20000 is equipped with an LED screen that displays 'Power, Mode, and E-Liquid' percentage, always keeping you informed.

Product Specifications:

 

  • Puffs: Up to 20,000
  • Coil: Triple Mesh Coil
  • 3 Modes: Lite / Smooth / Turbo
  • Screen Display: Power, Mode, E-Liquid
  • Battery: 850 mAh
  • E-liquid: 20 mL
  • Charging Port: Type-C

10 Flavours:

 

- Blue Razz Ice: A tantalizing blend of tangy blue raspberries and a refreshing menthol kick.

 

- Blueberry Pear: A delightful fusion of juicy blueberries and succulent pears. 

 

- Grape Ice: A juicy grape flavour that captures the essence of sweet grapes paired with a cool sensation.

 

- Green Apple Ice: Crisp and tart green apples blended with a cool menthol breeze. 

 

- Ice Mint: A pure and invigorating burst of minty freshness. 

 

- Miami Mint: A smooth, sophisticated blend of mint with a hint of tropical sweetness.

description:
What's in the box

Each pack contains 1 disposable vape device.


Available in the standard 20 mg/mL nicotine strength.


20 mL of e-Liquid providing up to 20,000 puffs. 


The internal 1000 mAh battery is rechargeable with the USB Type C port.

 

Explore STLTH VISION, with a generous 20 mL of e-Liquid, STLTH VISION delivers up to 20,000 puffs. Equipped with three modes to suit your preferences: Eco Mode for extended use, Normal Mode for a balanced experience, and Boost Mode for maximum vapour and flavour.Eco Mode for extended use, Normal Mode for a balanced experience, and Boost Mode for maximum vapour and flavour.

 

The device features a large, dynamic display screen that provides clear visibility and easy monitoring of your selected mode, remaining e-Liquid level, and current battery percentage.This comprehensive display ensures that you can enjoy a seamless and hassle-free vaping experience, always staying informed and in control of your device's performance.

 

Dive into a wide range of flavours with STLTH VISION. Enjoy our classics such as Juicy Peach Ice, a refreshing blend of juicy peach with a cool ice sensation. Explore Coconut Razz Ice, a delightful mix of coconut, raspberry, and a refreshing icy sensation. Discover an exciting blend of refreshing and delightful flavours in every puff. Explore your preferred flavour with the STLTH VISION disposable.

 

A proud participant of the National Greening Program.

What's in the box

Each pod pack contains 2 disposable vape pods, each individually packaged for optimal freshness.

4.0 mL of e-Liquid per pod.

Available in the standard 20 mg/mL nicotine strength.

______

As a participant in the National Greening Program, every sale of STLTH products contributes to the planting of more trees with the help of Tree Canada, a national non-profit organization.

______

The STLTH PRO is meticulously designed with the user's needs in mind, providing an impressive 4 mL e-liquid capacity per pod, expertly tailored for all-day usage. Stay effortlessly informed about your e-liquid levels, thanks to the device's transparent e-liquid container, eliminating any unexpected surprises.

Experience an unrivalled level of comfort and enhanced usability with the STLTH PRO's ergonomic design and soft-touch sensation. Our carefully crafted soft-tip mouthpiece takes your vaping to new heights, ensuring an unparalleled level of satisfaction.

Enjoy a worry-free and mess-free vaping experience with STLTH PRO Pods, ingeniously engineered with advanced protection. Each pod pack is sealed for freshness, and upon opening, simply remove the freshness rod from the mouthpiece and begin vaping immediately. This preserves the pod's freshness until its first use, guaranteeing a consistently delightful vaping experience.

name: STLTH Original Pods(Frost Mint)
description:
Each pack contains 3 disposable vape pods, each individually packaged for optimal freshness.

2.0 mL of E-liquid per pod.

Available in the standard 20 mg/mL and Bold 50 strengths. 

______

As a participant in the National Greening Program, every sale of STLTH products contributes to the planting of more trees with the help of Tree Canada, a national non-profit organization. Thanks to your purchase, STLTH has helped plant over 8,300 new trees in Canada.

______

STLTH’s disposable vape pod system allows you all the convenience of a disposable vape without tossing valuable lithium batteries in the trash. The STLTH vape system uses a rechargeable battery base that provides the best experience when using the original disposable vape pods as well as the new STLTH X pods.

 

The nicotine blend used in STLTH vape pods is proprietary and purposely made to give the user a smooth experience to help accommodate adult smokers who are looking to make the switch from traditional tobacco-based nicotine sources like cigarettes and cigars.  

 

STLTH disposable vape pods are a great alternative to fully disposable vapes with enclosed lithium batteries since the STLTH vape pods fit into your rechargeable STLTH Device and the empty pods can be recycled through our current recycling program alongside your original STLTH X vape pods.

name: STLTH Loop 25k(White Grape Ice)
description:
Each pack contains 1 disposable vape pod.

20 mL of e-Liquid.

Available in the standard 20 mg/mL nicotine strength.

 

Explore the STLTH LOOP 25K Pods made for a long-lasting experience. While containing 20mL of e-Liquid, these pods can deliver up to 25,000 puffs. Seamlessly compatible with the LOOP devices, the LOOP 25K Pods can communicate their e-Liquid levels, letting you know when it's time to change pods.


With a vertical mesh coil, these pods increase the absorption surface area and boost flavour intensity, providing the robust flavour typically found in disposables while remaining eco-friendly and cost-effective.

 

Offering a diverse selection of flavours, from cool iced options to classic favourites, the STLTH LOOP 25K Pods has something for everyone. The matte finish and functional design of the pods not only improve their look but also ensure a comfortable experience.

The device has adjustable airflow and is compatible with various LUXE X pods, allowing you to customize your MTL vaping experience.

name: Vaporesso Xros 4 Nano Open Pod kit (Twilight Purple)
description:
Vaporesso XROS 4 NANO — With the largest battery in the Xros Family, is the first XROS to feature a 1.3'' TFT color screen. It offers a 1350 mAh battery, 2A fast charging, button operation, and adjustable airflow all in one device. COREX 2.0 technology in the 0.4-ohm pod provides richer flavor and longer pod life, supported by the stable Axon chip. It is fully compatible with all XROS pods.

  • Largest battery in the Xros Family with 1350 mAh capacity
  • First XROS device featuring a 1.3'' TFT color screen

  • Button operation for easy control

  • COREX 2.0 technology in the 0.4-ohm pod for richer flavor and longer pod life

name: Vaporesso Xros 4 pod kit (PASTLE PALETTE)
description:
XROS 4 pod kit incorporates a compact and simple device that delivers amazing flavour under a steady output. The XROS 4 welcomes the latest COREX 2.0 smart chipset, designed to offer three output modes for a triad of vaping experiences you can personalise your journey through. Vaporesso honed in on durability with the XROS 4 kit by including a powerful 1000mAh battery that enables quick 2A charging, fully recharging in only 30 minutes.

With the XROS 4 pod kit, vapers can enjoy a durable and reliable device that caters to various vaping preferences. The kit comes with two XROS Pod options, the 0.6Ω and 0.8Ω pods, utilising their COREX 2.0 technology to optimise either nic salt or freebase e-liquids. Along with its adjustable airflow slider, the XROS 4 pod kit covers you for amazing mouth-to-lung (MTL) or restricted-direct-to-lung (RDL) vaping styles.

name: UWELL Caliburn GK3 PodKit (Crimson)
description: The UWELL CALIBURN GK3 POD KIT [CRC] is a cutting-edge pod system designed for a futuristic vaping experience. The kit features a 2ml UWELL CALIBURN G3 REPLACEMENT POD [CRC] with an integrated mesh coil, offering mouth-to-lung satisfaction and a rich taste. With a powerful 900mAh internal battery capable of delivering up to 25W output, this lightweight and compact device boasts a see-through case for a stylish look. The dual airflow system and full-width LCD display on the front enhance user convenience, providing information on power, resistance, battery capacity, and puff count. The UWELL CALIBURN GK3 POD KIT [CRC] ensures a leakproof experience, improving flavor by 150%, and includes both 0.6ohm and 0.9ohm pods for versatile vaping straight out of the box. With a durable PCTG plastic construction, lanyard loop for portability, and Type-C charging for faster recharging, the UWELL CALIBURN GK3 POD KIT [CRC] strikes the perfect balance between style, flavor, and convenience.

name: STLTH Loop 25k(Cherry Grape Ice)
description:
Each pack contains 1 disposable vape pod.

20 mL of e-Liquid.

Available in the standard 20 mg/mL nicotine strength.

 

Explore the STLTH LOOP 25K Pods made for a long-lasting experience. While containing 20mL of e-Liquid, these pods can deliver up to 25,000 puffs. Seamlessly compatible with the LOOP devices, the LOOP 25K Pods can communicate their e-Liquid levels, letting you know when it's time to change pods.


With a vertical mesh coil, these pods increase the absorption surface area and boost flavour intensity, providing the robust flavour typically found in disposables while remaining eco-friendly and cost-effective.

 

Offering a diverse selection of flavours, from cool iced options to classic favourites, the STLTH LOOP 25K Pods has something for everyone. The matte finish and functional design of the pods not only improve their look but also ensure a comfortable experience.

description:
STLTH Loop 2 Switch Pods: A Revolution in Vaping Convenience

The STLTH Loop 2 Switch Pods redefine convenience and versatility in vaping with their innovative dual-flavor design. Each pod is ingeniously engineered to house two distinct flavors, offering a seamless transition between them simply by flipping the pod around. This unique feature allows users to enjoy a diverse range of flavors without needing to switch pods or devices, making it incredibly convenient for on-the-go vaping enthusiasts.

 

Compatibility

 

These pods are designed to be compatible with the STLTH Loop 2 Device. To enjoy the dual flavour option, simply flip the pod around, and its magnetic connector will sit in place perfectly each time.

Generous E-Liquid Capacity

Designed for extended use, each STLTH Loop 2 Switch Pod contains a generous 18mL of e-liquid, divided into two 9mL compartments for each flavour. This ample capacity ensures a long-lasting vaping experience, reducing the need for frequent refills and enhancing user satisfaction.

 

Impressive Puff Lifespan

 

With an impressive lifespan of up to 15,000 puffs per pod, the Loop 2 Switch Pods stand out for their durability and efficiency. Whether you prefer the bold richness of tobacco in one compartment or the fruity sweetness of berries in the other, these pods deliver consistent flavor and smooth vapour production throughout their extended usage.

 

Sleek and Ergonomic Design

 

Beyond their functionality, the Loop 2 Switch Pods feature a sleek and ergonomic design that fits comfortably in hand, complemented by a secure magnetic connection to STLTH devices. This ensures a stable connection and prevents leaks, maintaining a clean vaping experience.

description: The UWELL CALIBURN G3 POD KIT [CRC] is a low-maintenance vape that is ideal for beginners and experienced vapers alike. It’s 900mAh built-in battery will provide enough charge for long vaping sessions and the 5-25W output is ideal for RDTL (Restricted Direct To Lung) and MTL (Mouth To Lung) vaping. name: LEVELX BOOST G25K (SUPER SOUR BLUEBERRY)
description:
Take your vaping experience to unprecedented heights with the new Level X Boost Series Pods! This cutting-edge release from Flavour Beast pushes the envelope of vaping satisfaction, bringing innovative features that are redefining the industry standards. The Level X Boost Series Pods represent the pinnacle of Flavour Beast’s creativity, raising the bar for what’s achievable in vaping technology. Prepare to leave the ordinary behind and embrace an extraordinary vaping journey that will keep you coming back for more.

With a 20mL e-liquid capacity, the Level X Boost Series Pods dominate the competition. Boasting a nicotine concentration of 20mg/mL and an impressive 25,000 Puffs, these pods ensure your vaping pleasure extends far beyond the usual limits. The incredibly sweet flavours now come in an even larger volume, allowing you to savor your favorite Flavour Beast tastes for extended periods without any interruptions, all thanks to the massive pod capacity.

Equipped with a 1.0Ω Mesh Coil and a 0.5Ω Dual-Mesh Coil that delivers double the power at 23W, the Level X Boost Series Pods are a technical masterpiece in vaping. A simple flip of a switch activates the Boost Mode, doubling the flavour and hit for a vaping experience like no other. While these pods are fully compatible with all Level X Devices for standard use, the unique Boost Mode requires the new Level X Boost Device to unlock its full potential, offering an unparalleled experience.

Don’t just vape—elevate your vaping experience with the Level X Boost Series Pods. Packed with groundbreaking features and seamless compatibility, this is the pod you’ve been waiting for. Make the switch today and discover what it truly means to enjoy vaping. The Level X Boost Series Pods, where innovation meets ultimate satisfaction.

These Pods are compatible with ALL Level X Devices - however, in order to unlock it's fullest power potential, pair it with the Level X Boost Device.

name: LEVEL X BOOST G2 25K(ORANGE FIZZ ICE)
description:
Introducing the Orange Fizz Ice Drip'n Level X Boost G2 Pods, the latest innovation in the Level X family. These pods feature an impressive 20mL capacity, delivering up to 25,000 puffs and setting a new benchmark for Level X pods. Compatible with the Level X Boost battery and the new Level X Boost G2 battery, the Level X Boost G2 pods offer three distinct firing modes: Eco Mode for up to 25,000 puffs of smooth, subtle flavour; Standard Mode for up to 15,000 puffs of rich, flavourful hits; and Boost Mode for up to 10,000 puffs of intense flavour and cloud production.

The Level X Drip'n Boost G2 pods provide the customization and exceptional flavour you’ve come to expect from your Level X vape. Equipped with dual airflow settings, these Level X vape pods allow you to choose between low and high airflow options, ensuring a tailored vaping experience. The dual mesh 0.5ohm coils, activated in Boost mode, offer enhanced flavour and airflow control, making every puff satisfying and full of flavour.

With the Dripn Level X pods, you get the perfect blend of performance and convenience. Elevate your vaping experience with Dripn Boost G2 pods, designed for those who demand the best in flavour and customization. Enjoy the advanced features and long-lasting performance and experience the pinnacle of vaping technology with the Level X Boost G2.

description:

name: STLTH Vision 20K(Arctic Mint)
description:
What's in the box

Each pack contains 1 disposable vape device.


Available in the standard 20 mg/mL nicotine strength.


20 mL of e-Liquid providing up to 20,000 puffs. 


The internal 1000 mAh battery is rechargeable with the USB Type C port.

 

Explore STLTH VISION, with a generous 20 mL of e-Liquid, STLTH VISION delivers up to 20,000 puffs. Equipped with three modes to suit your preferences: Eco Mode for extended use, Normal Mode for a balanced experience, and Boost Mode for maximum vapour and flavour.Eco Mode for extended use, Normal Mode for a balanced experience, and Boost Mode for maximum vapour and flavour.

 

The device features a large, dynamic display screen that provides clear visibility and easy monitoring of your selected mode, remaining e-Liquid level, and current battery percentage.This comprehensive display ensures that you can enjoy a seamless and hassle-free vaping experience, always staying informed and in control of your device's performance.

 

Dive into a wide range of flavours with STLTH VISION. Enjoy our classics such as Juicy Peach Ice, a refreshing blend of juicy peach with a cool ice sensation. Explore Coconut Razz Ice, a delightful mix of coconut, raspberry, and a refreshing icy sensation. Discover an exciting blend of refreshing and delightful flavours in every puff. Explore your preferred flavour with the STLTH VISION disposable.

 

A proud participant of the National Greening Program.
